posts.author: KB0707
posts.community: Sunteck Realty - Quality Real Estate Company
posts.text: Out of the 42k crores GMV, 18k cr is in doubt. Kalyan project and Dubai Project. Dubai is a short to mid term issue and not in the control of the management as it’s a geopolitical issue, but Kalyan doesn’t fit in the companies portfolio. All other Indian projects for the company are on the west side and would benefit from the infra push (coastal road + metro combination) whereas Kalyan there is no infra push in sight and will be tough to sell inventory over there as its quite an unattractive destination in Mumbai. Views??
